title: Electronic Reporting: X++ data-provider class consumed by an ER model mapping
instruction: In the sandbox model, build the X++ half of an Electronic Reporting integration. Ground it first with get_knowledge(topic="electronic-reporting"). SCOPE LIMIT: the ER model, mapping and format are configured in the UI and are NOT AOT elements - they are out of scope and must not be hand-authored. Create a class DemoErDataProvider that ER can bind to as an application data source: a public class with a static construct(), a `public container getInvoiceTotals(Num _documentId)` returning the aggregated values ER will read, and public parm methods for every value the format consumes (no protected state reachable only through internals). Every returned string must come from a label. Document, in the class' DeveloperDocumentation, which ER model-mapping data source binds to it. Confirm any ER framework base class or interface you use with search before writing it - do not guess. The class must build with zero BP errors.
